title: Dynamites Overhaul
description: Adds a lots of vanilla-styled dynamites in the game, overhauled all TNT system and new villager profession!
body:
![Dynamites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a9dc500c2d76df1e3e5bb02eaeda054f52c5fdd.png)
![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2582bfe38a6ffeb34d5ee37dd1854b312919847.png)

# 📖 About
This mod adds a lot of TNTs: Small TNT, bunch of TNTs, large bunch of TNTs, new items such as red paper special for TNTs, new realistic recipes etc.

Also this mod adds new villager profession: Exploder.New villager is selling new items and TNTs and some useful resources
